title: Junglemahal: The Awakening
overview: Loosely based on real incidents in the monsoon of mid 80s during the uprising of naxalites in eastern ghat range a group of travellers travels through the deep forests to reach the rescue camps. A series of mysterious incidents started taking place around them as the place is not what it seems.
